messages.content: You are a strict data-quality judge for tool-use training tasks in the style of the NESTFUL benchmark. Output STRICT JSON only.

text:
{
    "nestful_like": false,
    "ambiguous": false,
    "natural": false,
    "quality_score": 0.4,
    "issues": ["Sentence structure is unnatural, resembling a template dump with disjoint steps.", "Contains explicit step numbering (3 tool calls) and final verification clause, lacking multi-step imperative/interrogative phrasing.", "Word count is far below the 25-60 range; only 11 words in the core question.", "Violates NESTFUL-like style: not concise concrete everyday quantities in a single paragraph."]
}
